purpose: Declares WebViewHost, the wrapper that creates the Microsoft Edge WebView2 environment/controller, navigates it to the rendered HTML document, manages virtual host mappings (markdownplusplus.local for plugin assets, markdownplusplus.document for the markdown file's directory), routes webMessage scroll/link events back to the C++ layer via callbacks, and drives ShowPrintUI / PrintToPdf.
exports: using ScrollCallback = std::function<void(int, double, bool)> (sourceLine, ratio, force)
WebViewHost::Create(HWND parent, const std::wstring& assetRoot) -> HRESULT
WebViewHost::NavigateToString(document, articleHtml, title, documentRoot, initialSourceLine, initialScrollRatio, initialAnchorRatio, mermaidEnabled)
invariants: Non-copyable; owns ComPtr<ICoreWebView2Environment/Controller/WebView2> and registered event tokens. Destroy() releases them in the right order and undoes CoInitializeEx.

Ready() is true only once the controller is created (ready_), the webView_ ComPtr is non-null, AND a document has been navigated (documentLoaded_) - all three matter for Export PDF / Print preconditions.
Scroll/link callbacks are invoked from WebView2 message-pump callbacks on the UI thread - do not block.
gotchas: pendingDocumentRevision_ guards against stale ExecuteScript continuations re-navigating after a newer document arrived; preserve revision-equality checks in ApplyPendingContentUpdate.
The header includes <WebView2.h> from the NuGet-extracted SDK at packages/Microsoft.Web.WebView2.<ver>/build/native/include - missing SDK breaks the build.
